category_sources: Official StringTie GitHub README describes transcript assembly and quantitation of RNA-Seq data.
source_facts.description says StringTie provides transcript assembly and quantification for RNA-Seq.
display_name_sources: Official StringTie documentation and README use the display name StringTie.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README refers users to the official StringTie website for additional documentation and source/binary packages.
Official Johns Hopkins CCB StringTie page provides the manual/documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has the official repository URL https://github.com/gpertea/stringtie, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official StringTie README describes transcript structure recovery and abundance estimation from RNA-Seq reads.
source_facts.description identifies RNA-Seq transcript assembly and quantification.
